items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: A button component with multiple variants and sizes.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Displays a form input field.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Renders an accessible label for form controls.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Visually or semantically separates content.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Use to show a placeholder while content is loading.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A set of layered sections of content.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A window overlaid on either the primary window.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Displays a menu to the user triggered by a button.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that reveal content.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Displays a callout for user attention with multiple variants.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between on and off states.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Displays a multi-line text input field.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Displays an indicator showing the completion progress of a task.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: An animated loading indicator for async operations.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: A two-state button that can be either on or off.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: A side panel that slides in from any edge of the screen.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: A set of checkable buttons where no more than one can be checked at a time.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A responsive table component for displaying structured data.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: An interactive component which expands/collapses a panel.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Sonner
items.description: An opinionated toast notification component built on Sonner.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Fast, composable command palette with keyboard navigation.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: A date picker calendar built on react-day-picker.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: Accessible form field primitives built on react-hook-form.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: A date picker combining calendar, popover, and button.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Autocomplete input and command palette with filtering.

items.name: hero
items.title: Hero
items.description: A hero section with headline, subheading, CTA buttons, and avatar social proof.

items.name: features
items.title: Features
items.description: A features section with a tabbed filter and responsive card grid.

items.name: pricing
items.title: Pricing
items.description: A three-tier pricing section with monthly/yearly toggle and highlighted popular plan.

items.name: faq
items.title: FAQ
items.description: A frequently asked questions section using a collapsible accordion.

items.name: contact-form
items.title: Contact Form
items.description: A contact form section with name, email, subject select, and message textarea.

items.name: stats
items.title: Stats
items.description: A stats section displaying key metrics in a responsive four-column card grid.

items.name: testimonials
items.title: Testimonials
items.description: A testimonials section with a card grid, avatar initials, and quoted text.

items.name: login-form
items.title: Login Form
items.description: A login form with email, password, remember me checkbox, and social sign-in.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A searchable, filterable data table with status badges and row actions.

items.name: settings-form
items.title: Settings Form
items.description: An account settings page with profile fields, notification toggles, and security options.

items.name: navbar
items.title: Navbar
items.description: Top navigation bar with logo, nav links, mobile hamburger menu, and CTA button.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Left navigation sidebar with icon items, collapsible sections, and active states.

items.name: signup-form
items.title: Signup Form
items.description: Registration form with name, email, password fields, and terms acceptance.

items.name: footer
items.title: Footer
items.description: Multi-column footer with links, social icons, newsletter signup, and copyright.

items.name: profile-card
items.title: Profile Card
items.description: User profile card with avatar, bio, follower stats, and action buttons.
